nasb.text: Will you steal, murder, and commit adultery and swear falsely, and offer sacrifices to Baal and walk after other gods that you have not known,

esv.text: Will you steal, murder, commit adultery, swear falsely, make offerings to Baal, and go after other gods that you have not known,

cnv.text: 你們怎可偷盜、兇殺、姦淫、起假誓、向巴力燒香，跟從你們素不認識的別神，

ccb.text: 你们偷盗、谋杀、通奸、起假誓、向巴力献祭、拜素不认识的神明，
